# Replication files for veto power

# Setup and packages

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library("pacman")
p_load(plyr, dplyr, tidyr, ggplot2, tidyverse, RColorBrewer, readxl,
       readr, haven, countrycode,
       rqog, igoR, modelsummary, knitr, kableExtra, flextable, unvotes)

igo_dataset <- read_rds("~/Desktop/igo_flexibility/igo_dataset_for_analysis.rds")
```

---
```{r}
dv <- igo_dataset$poolconstit

cat("=== Summary Stats ===\n")
summary(dv)

cat("\n=== Proportion of exact zeros ===\n")
mean(dv == 0, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("\n=== Skewness ===\n")
moments::skewness(dv, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("\n=== Unique values ===\n")
length(unique(na.omit(dv)))
sort(unique(na.omit(dv)))

cat("\n=== Zero vs nonzero breakdown ===\n")
table(dv == 0, useNA = "ifany")

cat("\n=== Within-IGO variation ===\n")
igo_dataset %>%
  filter(year >= 1960) %>%
  arrange(cow_igocode, year) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cow_igocode) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_years   = n(),
    n_changes = sum(poolconstit != lag(poolconstit), na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_within = round(sd(poolconstit, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_igos        = n(),
    igos_zero_changes = sum(n_changes == 0),
    igos_any_changes  = sum(n_changes > 0),
    pct_never_changed = round(mean(n_changes == 0) * 100, 1),
    max_changes       = max(n_changes),
    mean_sd_within    = round(mean(sd_within, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
  )
```

# Data Analysis for main paper
```{r}
igo_dataset %>%
  dplyr::filter(year >= 1960) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(cow_igocode, year) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(cow_igocode) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    ioname      = dplyr::first(na.omit(ioname)),
    n_years     = dplyr::n(),
    n_changes   = dplyr::n_distinct(poolconstit, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
    first_value = dplyr::first(na.omit(poolconstit)),
    last_value  = dplyr::last(na.omit(poolconstit)),
    sd_within   = round(sd(poolconstit, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    .groups     = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(n_changes)) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

```


```{r}
library(lmtest)
library(plm)

igo_analysis <- igo_dataset[igo_dataset$year>=1960,]
y <- igo_analysis$poolconstit

model0 <-plm(y
            ~ polyarchy,
            data = igo_analysis,
            index = c("cow_igocode", "year"),
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)

model0$vcov<-plm::vcovHC(model0, type="HC1", cluster="group")

model1 <-plm(poolconstit ~ polyarchy  + number + 
                  political + social + hh_gdp +
                  gdp_cap  + trade + globalization + alliances +
                  polyarchy_sd + ideal_sd,
            data = igo_analysis,
            index = c("cow_igocode", "year"),
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)
coeftest(model1, vcov=vcovHC(model1, type="HC1", cluster = "group"))
model1$vcov<-plm::vcovHC(model1, type="HC1", cluster = "group")

```

# robustness check

```{r}
r_model1 <- plm(poolconstit
            ~ libdem + gdp_cap  + trade + globalization + alliances +
              number + political + social 
              + polyarchy_sd + hh_gdp  + ideal_sd ,
            index = c("cow_igocode", "year"),
            data = igo_analysis,
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)

coeftest(r_model1, vcov=vcovHC(r_model1, type="HC1", cluster = c("group")))
r_model1$vcov<-plm::vcovHC(r_model1, type="HC1", cluster = "group")


r_model2 <-plm(poolconstit
            ~ polyarchy + gdp_cap  + trade + globalization + alliances +
              number + political + social 
              + polyarchy_sd + hh_gdp  + ideal_sd ,
            index = c("cow_igocode", "year"),
            data = igo_analysis,
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)

coeftest(r_model2, vcov=vcovHC(r_model2, type="HC1", cluster = c("group")))
r_model2$vcov<-plm::vcovHC(r_model2, type="HC1", cluster = "group")


r_model3 <-plm(poolconstit
            ~ percentage + gdp_cap  + trade + globalization + alliances +
              number + political + social 
              + polyarchy_sd + hh_gdp  + ideal_sd ,
            index = c("cow_igocode", "year"),
            data = igo_analysis,
            model = "within",
            effect = "time"
)


coeftest(r_model3, vcov=vcovHC(r_model3, type="HC1", cluster = c("group")))
r_model3$vcov<-plm::vcovHC(r_model3, type="HC1", cluster = "group")

```



# Results Visualization
```{r results-output}
library(modelsummary)
library(ggplot2)
library(officer)
library(flextable)

# ‚îÄ‚îÄ Coefficient map ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
cm <- c(
  'polyarchy'        = 'Polyarchy (Mean)',
  'percentage'       = 'Percentage of Democracy',
  'libdem'           = 'Liberal Democracy',
  'gdp_cap'          = 'GDP Per Capita',
  'trade'            = 'Trade',
  'globalization'    = 'Globalization',
  'alliances'        = 'Alliances',
  'number'           = 'Number',
  'political'        = 'Political',
  'social'           = 'Social',
  'hh_gdp'           = 'Economy HHI',
  'ideal_sd'         = 'Preference Heterogeneity',
  'polyarchy_sd'     = 'Political Heterogeneity'
)

# ‚îÄ‚îÄ Model lists ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
main_models <- list(
  "Baseline" = model0,
  "Main"     = model1
)

rob_models <- list(
  "LibDem"     = r_model1,
  "Polyarchy"  = r_model2,
  "Percentage" = r_model3
)

main_vcovs <- list(model0$vcov, model1$vcov)
rob_vcovs  <- list(r_model1$vcov, r_model2$vcov, r_model3$vcov)

# ‚îÄ‚îÄ 1. COEFFICIENT PLOT ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
p <- modelplot(
  main_models,
  vcov      = main_vcovs,
  coef_map  = cm,
  coef_omit = "Intercept"
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text        = element_text(family = "Times New Roman", size = 13),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    x       = "Coefficient Estimate (95% CI)",
    y       = NULL,
    caption = "Year fixed effects. Cluster-robust SEs at IGO level."
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  "~/Desktop/igo_flexibility/results/main_coef_plot.png",
  plot   = p,
  width  = 7,
  height = 6,
  device = "png",
  dpi    = 300
)

# ‚îÄ‚îÄ 2. MAIN TABLE ‚Üí .docx ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
# Generate as text first, then write to file
modelsummary(
  main_models,
  vcov      = main_vcovs,
  stars     = TRUE,
  coef_map  = cm,
  coef_omit = "Intercept",
  gof_map   = c("nobs", "r.squared", "adj.r.squared"),
  title     = "Constitutional Pooling and IGO Regime Composition",
  notes     = "Year fixed effects. Cluster-robust SEs at IGO level.",
  output    = "~/Desktop/igo_flexibility/results/table1_main.tex",
  booktabs  = TRUE,
  escape    = FALSE,
  float     = FALSE,
  output    = "latex"   # forces classic tabular
)

# ‚îÄ‚îÄ 3. ROBUSTNESS TABLE ‚Üí .tex for Overleaf ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
modelsummary(
  rob_models,
  vcov      = rob_vcovs,
  stars     = TRUE,
  coef_map  = cm,
  coef_omit = "Intercept",
  gof_map   = c("nobs", "r.squared", "adj.r.squared"),
  title     = "Robustness: Alternative Democracy Measures",
  notes     = "Year fixed effects. Cluster-robust SEs at IGO level.",
  output    = "~/Desktop/igo_flexibility/results/tableA1_robustness.tex",
  booktabs  = TRUE,
  escape    = FALSE,
  float     = FALSE       # ‚Üê this is the key fix
)
```



```{r}
library(mediation)



# ‚îÄ‚îÄ MEDIATION : Through legislative competitiveness ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
med_model_leg <- lm(
  legislative_competitiveness ~ polyarchy + colonial + number + 
    gdp_cap + population + trade + globalization + 
    alliances + polyarchy_sd,
  data = igo_analysis
)

out_model_leg <- lm(
  poolconstit ~ polyarchy + legislative_competitiveness + 
    colonial + number + hh_gdp + gdp_cap + population + 
    trade + globalization + alliances + polyarchy_sd + ideal_sd,
  data = igo_analysis
)

med_result_leg <- mediate(
  med_model_leg, out_model_leg,
  treat    = "polyarchy",
  mediator = "legislative_competitiveness",
  robustSE = TRUE,
  sims     = 1000
)
summary(med_result_leg)

# ‚îÄ‚îÄ MEDIATION 3: Through executive competitiveness ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
med_model_exec <- lm(
  executive_competitiveness ~ polyarchy + colonial + number + 
    gdp_cap + population + trade + globalization + 
    alliances + polyarchy_sd,
  data = igo_analysis
)

out_model_exec <- lm(
  poolconstit ~ polyarchy + executive_competitiveness + 
    colonial + number + hh_gdp + gdp_cap + population + 
    trade + globalization + alliances + polyarchy_sd + ideal_sd,
  data = igo_analysis
)

med_result_exec <- mediate(
  med_model_exec, out_model_exec,
  treat    = "polyarchy",
  mediator = "executive_competitiveness",
  robustSE = TRUE,
  sims     = 1000
)
summary(med_result_exec)
```
